# superset Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "superset" {
  endpoint     = "https://superset.example.com"
  access_token = "replace-me"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) Superset base URL, for example `https://superset.example.com`.

### Optional

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) Superset API bearer token. Configure this instead of `username` and `password` when a token is already available.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Superset password used for API login. Configure with `username` when `access_token` is not provided.
- `username` (String) Superset username used for API login. Configure with `password` when `access_token` is not provided.
